pages.text: $(thing)Bear Traps$() immobilize and damage creatures that trigger them. Build them in two stages: forge trap halves, then weld halves into a full trap.
Forge $(thing)Bear Trap Halves$() on an anvil from wrought iron.
Weld two trap halves into a finished bear trap.

pages.title: Usage
pages.text: Use a $(thing)Shovel$() to bury a trap for concealment.$(br2)Shift-right-click a closed trap to reset it.$(br2)Captured entities are heavily hindered and can occasionally break free.
